code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
  let n = string.len(line)
  mut sum = 0
  mut i = 0
  mut in_num = false
  mut neg = false
  mut val = 0
  while i <= n
    let b = if i == n
      32
    else
      match string.byte_at(line, i)
      when Some(x)
        x
      when None
        32
      end
    end
    if b >= 48 and b <= 57
      val = val * 10 + (b - 48)
      in_num = true
    else if b == 45 and not in_num
      neg = true
      in_num = true
    else
      if in_num
        let num = if neg
          0 - val
        else
          val
        end
        if num > 0
          sum = sum + 2 * num
        end
        in_num = false
        neg = false
        val = 0
      end
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  println("result=#{sum}")
end
